title: Mobs Properties Randomness
description: Randomize mobs properties. Add Potion Effects, Equipment, on hit effects and more!
body:
# Summary
Mobs Properties Randomness lets you add/change many properties to mobs on spawn, and, with events, when other stuff happens, such as on attack, on tick or on death with data packs.

This mod requires [InsaneLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/insanelib)

As of 5.0.0 and up the mod (and its dependencies) now work server side only, so with MPR server you can connect with a vanilla client.

# The mod
The mod does nothing on its own, you have to make a data pack: [click here to get started](https://github.com/Insane96/MobsPropertiesRandomness/wiki/%5BVersion-5%5D-Mobs) (please note this is for latest version, [click here for a list of versions](https://github.com/Insane96/MobsPropertiesRandomness/wiki))  
You can also find a video tutorial playlist below.

Some stuff you can do:
* Potion Effects
* Attribute Modifiers
* Equipment
* Effect immunity
* NBT
* Events (attack, kill, target change)
* Presets (for creating stuff like bosses)
